title: Venezuelan Citrus Stir Fry
description: A sweet and tangy stir fry recipe inspired by Venezuelan cuisine, featuring glazed chicken, citrus, and peanuts.
instructions: 1. Heat 2 tablespoons of cooking oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the diced onions and bell peppers to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the glazed chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the citrus juice, Venezuelan peanut sauce, peanuts, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
5. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
6. Serve the stir fry hot, garnished with additional peanuts and citrus wedges if desired.
